common.privacy: Your files never leave your browser

categoryIntro.developer: A comprehensive suite of developer utilities that run entirely in your browser. Format, convert, encode, decode, and analyze data without sending anything to a server. Perfect for handling sensitive configuration files, API keys, and proprietary code.
categoryIntro.image: Professional image editing tools powered by client-side processing. Resize, compress, convert, crop, and enhance your images with zero upload latency and complete privacy. Supports all major formats including HEIC, WebP, SVG, and more.
categoryIntro.pdf: Complete PDF toolkit for merging, splitting, compressing, and editing PDF documents. All processing happens locally in your browser — ideal for confidential contracts, financial documents, and sensitive business files.
categoryIntro.video: Browser-based video editing powered by FFmpeg WebAssembly. Trim, compress, convert, and transform videos without uploading to any server. Supports MP4, WebM, MOV, and more.
categoryIntro.audio: Edit and convert audio files directly in your browser using FFmpeg WebAssembly. Trim, convert formats, and extract audio from video — all processed locally on your device.

home.heroSub: All processing happens in your browser. No uploads. No servers. Your files never leave your device.
home.metaDeckDesc: Privacy & security tools for your digital life
home.metaDescription: Free browser-based tools for media, PDF, and developer tasks. 100% local processing, zero uploads, complete privacy.

footer.tagline: Privacy-first browser tools for media, PDF & development. All processing stays on your device.

privacy.metaDescription: Learn how PrivaDeck protects your privacy. All file processing happens in your browser — nothing is uploaded to any server.
privacy.title: Privacy & Security
privacy.subtitle: Your files never leave your browser. We built PrivaDeck with privacy as the foundation, not an afterthought.
privacy.corePromiseBody: Every tool on PrivaDeck processes files entirely within your browser using client-side JavaScript and WebAssembly. Your files are never uploaded to any server, never stored anywhere, and never seen by anyone but you. When you close the tab, the data is gone.

step1.title: You select a file
step1.description: Your file is read directly by JavaScript in your browser. It never touches a network request.

step2.title: Processing happens locally
step2.description: All conversions, compressions, and edits run on your device using Web APIs, Canvas, WebAssembly (FFmpeg, PDF.js), and other browser technologies.

step3.title: You download the result
step3.description: The output is generated in-memory and offered as a download. No server is involved at any step.

noUpload.title: No File Uploads
noUpload.description: Files never leave your device. Processing uses your browser's built-in capabilities.

localStorage.title: No Persistent Storage
localStorage.description: We don't use cookies or local storage to track you. Your preferences (language, theme) are stored locally.

openSource.title: Verifiable Security
openSource.description: This is a static site with no backend — your data is never uploaded or stored anywhere.

noLogs.title: No Server Logs
noLogs.description: Since everything runs client-side, there are no server logs of your file operations.

transparent.title: Fully Transparent
transparent.description: This is a static site hosted on Cloudflare Pages. No backend, no database, no API servers.

privacy.thirdPartyBody: Some tools load WebAssembly binaries (e.g., FFmpeg core) from CDNs like unpkg.com. These are open-source libraries fetched once and cached by your browser. No file data is sent to these CDNs — they only provide the processing code. We also use Google Analytics to collect anonymous usage statistics (page views, general location, browser type). No personally identifiable information is linked to your tool usage.

howItWorks.metaDescription: Learn how PrivaDeck processes your files entirely in the browser using JavaScript and WebAssembly. No uploads, no servers.
howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps — your files stay on your device the entire time.

select.title: Pick Your File
select.description: Choose a file from your device or drag and drop it onto the tool. The file is read by JavaScript running inside your browser — it is never sent over the network.

process.title: Instant Local Processing
process.description: The tool processes your file right on your device using browser technologies like Canvas API, Web Audio API, and WebAssembly (FFmpeg, PDF.js, Tesseract). Processing speed depends on your device — most operations finish in seconds.

download.title: Download the Result
download.description: Once processing is complete, the output file is generated in memory and ready to download. Click the download button and save it anywhere on your device. No account or signup needed.

howItWorks.whyClientSideBody: Traditional online tools upload your files to a remote server, process them, and send the result back. This is slow, raises privacy concerns, and requires you to trust the service. PrivaDeck takes a different approach: every operation runs in your browser. Your files never leave your device, there are no upload size limits, and the tools work even on slow connections.

canvas.title: Canvas & Web APIs
canvas.description: Image operations like crop, resize, and format conversion use the browser's native Canvas API for fast, GPU-accelerated rendering.

wasm.title: WebAssembly
wasm.description: Video and audio tools use FFmpeg compiled to WebAssembly, running natively in the browser at near-native speed. PDF tools use PDF.js and pdf-lib.

webApis.title: Modern Web Standards
webApis.description: We leverage File API, Blob URLs, Web Workers, and other modern standards to handle large files efficiently without blocking the UI.

offline.title: Works Offline
offline.description: Since no server is involved, most tools continue to work even when your internet connection drops — as long as the page is already loaded.

howItWorks.privacyCta: Want to learn more about how we protect your data?

about.metaDescription: PrivaDeck is a free, browser-based toolbox for media, PDF, and developer tasks. Files never leave your device. Built on WebAssembly and Web APIs.
about.title: About PrivaDeck
about.subtitle: A free, privacy-first toolbox built on the open web. Every file stays on your device.
about.missionBody: Most online tools upload your files to a remote server before processing them. We thought that was backwards. PrivaDeck gives you a fast, free, modern alternative — every operation runs inside your browser, so your files never leave your device. No accounts, no servers, no surprises.
about.promiseBody: We don't collect your file contents, file names, or anything derived from them. There is no server-side log of what you process. The site is a static export deployed to Cloudflare Pages — when you close the tab, your data is gone.

wasm.title: WebAssembly
wasm.description: FFmpeg, PDF.js, and other native libraries compiled to WebAssembly run at near-native speed inside your browser.

canvas.title: Canvas & Web APIs
canvas.description: Image cropping, resizing, and format conversion use the browser's native Canvas API for GPU-accelerated rendering.

ffmpeg.title: FFmpeg.wasm
ffmpeg.description: Trim, compress, and convert videos and audio entirely client-side, powered by FFmpeg compiled to WebAssembly.

pdfLib.title: pdf-lib & PDF.js
pdfLib.description: Merge, split, rotate, and edit PDFs with battle-tested libraries that run completely in the browser.

terms.metaDescription: Terms of service for PrivaDeck — a free, browser-based privacy-first toolbox. By using the site you agree to these terms.
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: PrivaDeck is provided free of charge for personal and commercial use. By using the site you accept these terms.

acceptance.title: Acceptance
acceptance.body: By accessing or using PrivaDeck (privadeck.app), you agree to be bound by these terms. If you do not agree, do not use the site.

license.title: Free Use License
license.body: All tools on PrivaDeck are free to use for any lawful purpose, personal or commercial, without registration or sign-up. The site processes your files entirely in your browser — nothing is uploaded.

warranty.title: No Warranty
warranty.body: PrivaDeck is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind, express or implied. We make no guarantees about accuracy, reliability, completeness, fitness for a particular purpose, or uninterrupted availability.

liability.title: No Liability
liability.body: We are not liable for any damages arising from your use of the site, including data loss, file corruption, business interruption, or any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages — to the maximum extent permitted by law. You are responsible for keeping backups of important files before processing.

changes.title: Changes to These Terms
changes.body: We may update these terms at any time without prior notice. The current version is always available at this page. Continued use of the site after changes means you accept the updated terms.

governing.title: Governing Law & Contact
governing.body: These terms are governed by applicable local law in your jurisdiction. For questions, feedback, or concerns, please open an issue on our GitHub repository or contact us through the channels listed on the site.
